subject: Urgent Request: Microservices Engineer – Java – Gaming
body:
Hi,

We have a new opening in the gaming sector that might be of interest.

Our client is looking for a architect Microservices Engineer with strong experience in Java. The right candidate has solid knowledge of:

  • Java
  • AWS
  • Docker
  • Redis

Details:
Client: IronCastle Studios
Start: 2022-12-06
Duration: 6 months
Location: Stockholm (hybrid)
Rate: up to 1200 SEK/h

Don't hesitate to get in touch!

Best regards,
Lena Eriksson
Business Director
TechLink Sweden
Tel: +46 73 345 67 89
